title: ptychopyxis thwaitesii
intro: Ptychopyxis thwaitesii, also known as the Sri Lankan milk bush, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving digestion. Ptychopyxis thwaitesii is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies.
